title: senecillis yunnanensis
intro: Senecillis yunnanensis, also known as the Yunnan senecio, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Senecillis yunnanensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes.
